summary: Verified critical onboarding crash fix for add_credential step. Dashboard loads WITHOUT crashing for fulltest@test.com. The fix (add_credential config at line 18 and null guard at line 181) is working correctly.

critical_bug_fix.dashboard_loads_without_crash: PASS - fulltest@test.com login works and dashboard renders correctly with no 'Something Went Wrong' error
critical_bug_fix.onboarding_wizard_renders: PASS - OnboardingWizard component visible showing '4 of 6 complete'
critical_bug_fix.guided_overlay_6_steps: PASS - Guided overlay shows 'STEP 3 OF 6' confirming all 6 steps configured
critical_bug_fix.add_credential_config_present: PASS - Line 18 in OnboardingWizard.js has add_credential with icon, color, route, label, desc
critical_bug_fix.null_guard_present: PASS - Line 181 has 'if (!config) return null;' to prevent crash for unknown steps

credential_tests.demo_carryon_us: FAIL - 401 Invalid credentials (not related to bug fix, credentials may have changed)
credential_tests.info_carryon_us: FAIL - 401 Invalid credentials (not related to bug fix, credentials may have changed)

action_items: Demo account (demo@carryon.us) and Admin account (info@carryon.us) show 'Invalid credentials' - verify credentials are correct for this environment
critical_code_review_comments: The fix is complete and working - add_credential step config added and null guard implemented
context_for_next_testing_agent: Critical crash bug for add_credential step is FIXED and VERIFIED. fulltest@test.com user login works, dashboard loads without 'Something Went Wrong' error. Onboarding wizard shows 4 of 6 steps complete. Demo and admin credentials may need to be verified separately as they return 401. Rate limiter: 10 req/min on auth.
rca_of_the_issue: The crash was caused by missing add_credential config in STEP_CONFIG object in OnboardingWizard.js. When the backend returned 'add_credential' as the next_step, the frontend tried to access STEP_CONFIG['add_credential'] which was undefined, causing a crash when trying to render the step. Fix: Added add_credential config to STEP_CONFIG (line 18) and added null guard (line 181) to prevent future crashes for any unknown steps.
